pi_items.source: Hardcoded consistently in setup_task.sh (line 19), export_result.sh (line 18, 57), and verifier.py verification logic

Task description (line 5) confirms 'Ensure Channels 1 through 6 remain **Included** in the Bias signal (toggle them ON/Checked)'. OpenBCI documentation confirms Bias is a channel configuration that can be ON or OFF. verifier.py (line 117-119) checks for ch1_6_on boolean.

Task description (line 5) confirms '**Exclude** Channel 7 and Channel 8 from the Bias signal (toggle them OFF/Unchecked)'. OpenBCI documentation confirms Bias is a channel configuration. verifier.py (line 111-113) checks for ch7_8_off boolean.

privileged_info_summary: This is a GUI configuration task for OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2 (released August 21, 2023) using synthetic data generation. The task requires agents to configure Hardware Settings to exclude Channels 7 and 8 from the Bias signal while keeping Channels 1-6 included. The Bias setting is a reference signal configuration for the Cyton EEG board that helps with noise cancellation. Expected proof is a screenshot saved to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/bias_config.png. All metadata claims about the screenshot path and bias configuration targets are consistent with the task description and implementation code.
